name: MAMMA MIA! Bottomless Brunch at Ellen’s Stardust Diner!
description: Please note the Service Fee added to your tickets is a 20% gratuity charge that will directly go to your singing servers for the evening.----------🪩 MAMMA MIA! Bottomless Brunch at Ellens Stardust Diner 🎤 Grab your flares, glitter up, and get ready to eat, drink, and dance your heart outbecause the ULTIMATE MAMMA MIA!-fueled brunch experience is HERE! 🌟 WHAT TO EXPECT:🎶 LIVE, show-stopping performances inspired by MAMMA MIA! on Broadway from our World-Famous Singing Waitstaff!🥂 Two hours of pure brunch bliss, featuring your choice of delicious entre & bottomless mimosas (if you dare)!💃 Legendary Starduster performances that will have you singing Gimme! Gimme! Gimme! before dessert! 🎟 TICKET OPTIONS:✨ Regular Ticket - $50 (Entry + entre + soda/juice/tea/coffee)🥂 Bottomless Ticket - $75 (Everything above + unlimited mimosas for up to two hours!)🍸 Full cash bar available for all other cocktails! 👗 DRESS CODE:Channel your inner Dynamothink sequins, flares, and all things groovy! The more fabulous, the better! 📍 Brunch takes place in The Stardust Theater, below Ellens Stardust Diner. All guests must have pre-purchased tickets.
